/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/trajsim_tests.dir/tests/test_vec3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajsim_tests.dir/tests/test_mat3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajsim_tests.dir/tests/test_aerodynamics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajsim_tests.dir/tests/test_atmosphere.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajsim_tests.dir/tests/test_gravity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajsim_tests.dir/tests/test_liquid_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajsim_tests.dir/tests/test_guidance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajsim_tests.dir/tests/test_integrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajsim_tests.dir/tests/test_config_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajsim_tests.dir/tests/test_vehicle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajsim_tests.dir/tests/test_dynamics.cpp.o -o trajsim_tests  libtrajsim_lib.a lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgtest.a
